scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix apps/api" "npm run dev --prefix apps/web" "npm run dev --prefix apps/admin"
scripts.mobile:sync: npm run build --prefix apps/web && npm run cap --prefix apps/web sync
scripts.mobile:open-android: npm run cap --prefix apps/web open android
scripts.mobile:open-ios: npm run cap --prefix apps/web open ios
